name: query_channel
description: Get detailed information about a specific Pusher channel. Returns whether the channel is currently occupied (has active subscribers). For presence channels, also returns the number of distinct users and total subscription count. Use this to check if a specific channel is active before triggering events or to get real-time occupancy data.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Your Pusher application ID. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: channel_name
parameters.description: The name of the channel to query (e.g., 'orders', 'private-user-123', 'presence-room-42'). This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: Comma-separated attributes to include: 'user_count' (presence channels only), 'subscription_count' (must be enabled in dashboard).
